# Phase 3 — rectangle long enough to force a cross-aisle. Exercises:
#   - graph auto-generation with both interior and cross aisles
#   - graph directive (summary, vertices, edges)
#   - graph SVG layer (blue=interior, brown=perimeter)

polygon outer
0,0
400,0
400,160
0,160
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

set stalls_per_face=10
----
set stalls_per_face=10

generate
----
total_stalls: 164

graph summary
----
vertices: 24, edges: 74, perim_vertex_count: 4
  perimeter: 36, interior: 38

snapshot
----
